Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching input keywords, retrieving channel data, subscriber counts, and recent video performance.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves stored creator profiles, outreach sequences, and prompt templates from Drive to inform personalized outreach.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates First to Market email copy, sales sheet content, and monthly recap email text based on new product launch data provided as input.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth data, and email performance stats to populate the marketing highlights reporting slides.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order frequency, product categories, and revenue figures for analysis.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates B2B SEO-optimized blog content targeting DFC's core audiences: shops, distributors, and fleets.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style video references, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images and Wikimedia Commons, and fetches vehicle specs and history from Wikipedia to build a rich research package for the target vehicle.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors Asana for task updates, new assignments, overdue items, or status changes across connected projects.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification — make, model, year, and relevant part details — through a HubSpot form, which triggers the downstream automation workflow.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Gives Mark a simple, consistent input method that kicks off the entire catalog process instantly without requiring any back-and-forth with an internal team member to start the lookup.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the Dream inventory system using the submitted vehicle spec to retrieve all DFC parts that match those fitments and identify gaps where no part currently exists.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Pulls a complete fitment-matched inventory picture in seconds, replacing a manual catalog search that would otherwise require cross-referencing multiple internal databases.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Processes the raw Dream inventory results and structures them into a clean, formatted Excel-ready output that clearly shows what DFC stocks for the vehicle and what is missing from inventory.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a polished, client-ready catalog file without any manual formatting work, ensuring Mark receives a professional output he can act on or share immediately.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails the completed Excel catalog file directly to Mark with the vehicle spec confirmed in the subject line and the formatted file attached.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog to Mark's inbox automatically, closing the loop on his request without any manual handoff or follow-up needed from the internal team.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, retrieving on-hand quantity, on-order quantity, and in-transit data for each line item.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, consolidating all inventory intelligence into one enriched report in minutes.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Merges the live Dream inventory data into the existing backorder report, enriching each line with current status and automatically flagging any parts with no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source as dead-end items.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into an actionable enriched report with clear dead-end flags, so the team immediately knows which parts need escalation without any additional research.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backordered items, pre-populated with the live status data and tailored messaging based on whether inventory is incoming or has no source.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates the manual drafting of customer status updates across multiple team members, ensuring consistent and timely outreach goes out automatically as part of the weekly cycle.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract make, model, year, and part fitment data for all available two-piece rotor products.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitive fitment reference in minutes that would take days to compile manually by visiting each catalog separately and copying data by hand.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitment data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify which vehicles DFC already covers and which represent catalog gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly maps where DFC has competitive coverage and where opportunities exist, giving the product team a data-driven foundation for catalog expansion decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking about demand for specific vehicle fitments identified as catalog gaps, collecting interest data to validate before adding parts.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Replaces manual customer outreach with a scalable automated campaign that gathers real demand signals before committing to catalog additions, reducing the risk of stocking unsupported parts.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped competitor data, DFC cross-reference results, gap analysis, and customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a single, clean reference document with everything needed to make catalog decisions, eliminating the need to reconcile data from multiple sources or follow up on scattered emails.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields — headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs — and extracts the full text content from every live ad.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the complete ad copy universe across both platforms instantly, making it possible to run a phrase-level audit that would take hours of manual ad-by-ad review to replicate.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all extracted ad copy for the specified target phrases or language patterns and returns a flagged list identifying each exact match with the ad ID, field name, and verbatim copy where it was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Pinpoints every instance of flagged language across all active ads in seconds, enabling compliance or quality reviews that would otherwise require a person to read every ad manually.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the complete flagged results list to the requestor, showing each ad with the specific field and exact copy where each phrase match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an immediately actionable investigation report to the right person's inbox on demand, closing the loop without requiring any manual data export or formatting work.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, detects whether a PDF resume is attached, and routes each email into the processing workflow based on attachment status.
Resume Bot.impact: Eliminates the need for anyone to manually check the hiring inbox and sort applications, ensuring every candidate is captured and routed the moment their email arrives.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each incoming resume PDF to an organized Drive folder structure, filing by role and date so all candidate documents are stored in a consistent, retrievable location.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a permanent, organized archive of every applicant's resume automatically, replacing ad-hoc inbox saving and ensuring nothing is lost when hiring decisions are revisited.

Resume Bot.action: Reads each resume against the requirements of open roles and produces a score and hiring recommendation, while also generating appropriate auto-reply drafts for denied candidates, no-resume submissions, and applicants for paused roles.
Resume Bot.impact: Replaces hours of initial resume screening with consistent, criteria-based scoring and pre-written responses, letting hiring managers focus only on candidates who meet the threshold rather than every submission.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every candidate with their score, role matched, decision status, and Drive file link into the hiring dashboard, and routes paused-role applicants to a dedicated Pending tab for future review.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a real-time dashboard of every applicant and decision without any manual data entry, and ensures paused-role candidates are never lost and can be re-engaged when roles reopen.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is moving along strong — we currently have 56 total agents across the portfolio, with 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages, so the overall structure remains consistent with last week's update. While it was a quieter week on the tracking side, the 28 completed agents continue running in the background, driving value across email marketing, SEO, paid media, creator outreach, and more. As we head into the weeks ahead, keep an eye on the 10 in-progress agents — there's a solid wave of new capabilities getting close to the finish line!
